transcript: Speaker A (AI): तुम्हारे पापा कहाँ हैं? [Where is your father?] Speaker B (Human): My father is out of station. Speaker A (AI): Out of station नहीं, out of town होता है। [Not out of station, it's out of town.] Speaker B (Human): Okay, okay. Speaker A (AI): तुमने खाने में क्या खाया? [What did you eat?] Speaker B (Human): I get pija. Speaker A (AI): पिज्जा नहीं, सही प्रोनंसिएशन पिज्जा (pizza) होता है। और I get pizza नहीं, I had pizza होगा। [Not pija, the correct pronunciation is pizza. And not I get pizza, it will be I had pizza.] Speaker B (Human): अच्छा, ऐसा है क्या? मैं इंग्लिश कैसे सीखूँ? [Oh, is that so? How do I learn English?] Speaker A (AI): मेरे साथ रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो, एक महीने में ही इंग्लिश सीख जाओगे। [Practice with me for just 15 minutes daily, you will learn English in just one month.] Speaker B (Human): पर ये तो काफी महंगा होगा ना? [But this must be quite expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): बिल्कुल नहीं। सिर्फ एक रुपये में पूरी ऐप ट्राई कर सकते हो। 1 करोड़ से ज्यादा लोग मेरे साथ इंग्लिश सीख रहे हैं। [Not at all. You can try the whole app for just one rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning English with me.] Speaker B (Human): वाओ! फिर ज्वाइन कैसे करूँ? [Wow! Then how do I join?] Speaker A (AI): अभी MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो और इंग्लिश सीखना शुरू कर दो। [Download MySivi app now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: TUMHARE [YOUR], MY FATHER IS OUT OF STATION, OUT OF STATION, OUT OF TOWN, OKAY, PIJA, SAHI PRONUNCIATION [CORRECT PRONUNCIATION], PIZZA, I HAD PIZZA, ROZ SIRF 15 MINUTES [DAILY JUST 15 MINUTES], SIRF EK RUPAYE [JUST ONE RUPEE], ABHI MYSIVI APP [NOW MYSIVI APP]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a man's English mistakes in a split-screen format. She promotes the MySivi app, offering a 3-day premium trial for 1 rupee to practice English daily. The call to action prompts viewers to download the app.
